candidate_selection: same five within-type CM champions as Phase 8; ell^2 ties prefer larger logical image then lexicographically earliest stable ID
logical_action_defect: minimum over CM automorphism representatives of ||G^-1/2(U^T G U-G)G^-1/2||_F/sqrt(2g)
retention_score: mean exp(-(defect/tau)^2) over CM-enhanced logical actions, excluding the complete generic {+I,-I} image
surrogate: fixed Matern-5/2 GP with UCB mean+2*std
claim_boundary: tracks approximate retention of logical actions present at the CM baseline; does not enumerate new automorphisms of every deformed metric
